channel.title: news on Cédric Prigent Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in news on Cédric Prigent Tech Blog

item.title: My first post
item.description: A new journey Hi ! Welcome to my blog. My name is Cédric, I am a PhD candidate at the Inria research center of Rennes (France). My research work focuses on supporting Machine Learning in the Computing Continuum, especially through the use of Federated Learning. In this blog, I will share some of my works and tutorials. Hope, you find it useful !
